test_cases.name: happy_path_standard_routine
test_cases.scenario: User provides a typical morning and evening routine with clear timings, activities, and no major constraints. Skill should parse, analyze, identify 2-3 addressable leaks, suggest micro-habits, and produce optimized routines.

input.routine_description: I wake at 6 AM, shower for 10 minutes, eat breakfast while checking email for 15 minutes, commute for 30 minutes, arrive at work by 7:30 AM. In the evening, I finish work at 6 PM, spend 30 minutes on the commute home, have dinner with family for 45 minutes, then watch TV until 11 PM before bed.
input.energy_baseline: low morning energy, afternoon crash, evening second wind

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill executes all 7 phases successfully, producing all 7 outputs with complete analysis, at least 3 identified leaks, 3-5 starter-set micro-habits, and a comprehensive optimization report with before/after comparison.

test_cases.name: happy_path_minimal_input
test_cases.scenario: User provides only required input (routine_description) with no optional inputs. Skill should infer energy baseline, assume no constraints, suggest all micro-habit types, and produce complete analysis.

input.routine_description: I wake at 7 AM, shower for 15 minutes, eat breakfast for 20 minutes, leave for work at 8 AM. Work until 5 PM. Get home at 5:45 PM, eat dinner at 6 PM for 30 minutes, relax for 2 hours, then sleep at 9 PM.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill infers energy baseline from routine structure, assumes no fixed constraints, suggests micro-habits across all types, and produces complete optimization without requiring clarification.

test_cases.name: edge_case_vague_routine_description
test_cases.scenario: User provides vague routine description with fewer than 5 distinct activities (e.g., 'I wake up and go to work'). Skill should trigger Phase 1 error handling and request clarification.

input.routine_description: I wake up and go to work. I come home and sleep.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill detects insufficient detail, triggers Phase 1 error handling (Adjust response), and requests specific times, intermediate activities (shower, breakfast, commute), and pain points. Does not proceed to Phase 2 until clarification is provided.
phase_coverage: Error Handling: Phase 1 - Routine description too vague

test_cases.name: edge_case_no_fixed_routine
test_cases.scenario: User reports having no fixed routine (e.g., 'it varies every day'). Skill should trigger Phase 1 error handling and request a typical day or most common pattern.

input.routine_description: My routine varies every day depending on my schedule. Some days I wake early, some days late. I don't have a consistent pattern.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill detects lack of fixed routine, triggers Phase 1 error handling (Adjust response), and requests a typical day example (e.g., 'What does a typical Monday look like?'). Documents variations as constraints and provides adaptation templates for different schedule types.
phase_coverage: Error Handling: Phase 1 - User has no fixed routine

test_cases.name: edge_case_routine_outside_time_ranges
test_cases.scenario: User provides routine with morning duration <30 min or >90 min, or evening duration <30 min or >120 min. Skill should flag as unusual and request clarification.

input.routine_description: I wake at 6 AM and leave for work at 6:15 AM. I work until 10 PM, then come home and sleep immediately.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill identifies morning duration of 15 minutes (below 30-min minimum) and evening duration of 10 hours (above 120-min maximum), flags as unusual, and requests clarification on actual activities and timings.

test_cases.name: error_handling_energy_impact_ambiguous
test_cases.scenario: User's energy impact for a key activity is ambiguous (e.g., 'I don't know if exercise energizes me'). Skill should trigger Phase 2 error handling and suggest a 1-week trial.

input.routine_description: I wake at 6 AM, sometimes exercise for 20 minutes but I'm not sure if it helps my energy, eat breakfast, commute 30 minutes, work until 5 PM, come home, have dinner, watch TV, sleep at 11 PM.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill detects ambiguous energy impact for exercise, triggers Phase 2 error handling (Adjust response), and suggests a 1-week trial: perform exercise daily and log energy level before/after. Integrates trial results into Phase 4 micro-habit selection.
phase_coverage: Error Handling: Phase 2 - Energy impact ambiguous

test_cases.name: error_handling_constraint_conflict
test_cases.scenario: User has a constraint that conflicts with optimization recommendation (e.g., 'must check email first thing' but email is identified as energy drain). Skill should trigger Phase 3.5 error handling and propose mitigation strategies.

input.routine_description: I wake at 6 AM, immediately check email for 20 minutes (work requirement), shower, eat breakfast, commute 30 minutes, work until 6 PM, come home, dinner with family, watch TV, sleep at 11 PM.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill identifies conflict between 'must check email first thing' constraint and email being an energy drain. Triggers Phase 3.5 error handling (Adjust response) and proposes mitigation strategies: time-box email to 10 min, filter to urgent only, pair with cold water. Asks user to choose: accept constraint + mitigation, or negotiate constraint (e.g., check email at 8 AM instead).

test_cases.name: quality_gate_boundary_minimum_leaks
test_cases.scenario: User's routine is already well-optimized with fewer than 3 addressable leaks. Skill should adjust Phase 3 and focus on fine-tuning and resilience micro-habits instead of major restructuring.

input.routine_description: I wake at 6 AM, do 10-minute yoga, eat healthy breakfast with no screens, commute 30 minutes, work until 5 PM, come home at 5:45 PM, have dinner with family, take a 20-minute walk, read for 30 minutes, sleep at 10 PM.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill identifies that routine is already well-optimized with <3 addressable leaks. Adjusts Phase 3 focus to fine-tuning and resilience. Suggests full-set micro-habits for gradual adoption and provides 'resilience routines' for common disruptions (travel, illness, schedule changes).

test_cases.name: quality_gate_boundary_optimized_routine_exceeds_time
test_cases.scenario: Optimized routine exceeds user's available time. Skill should trigger Phase 5-6 error handling and prioritize activities by impact, reduce micro-habit count, or compress durations.

input.routine_description: I wake at 6 AM, shower 10 min, breakfast 15 min, commute 30 min, must leave by 7:30 AM. Evening: work until 6 PM, commute 30 min, dinner 45 min, must be in bed by 9 PM.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill identifies that optimized routine cannot fit within available time (morning: 6 AM to 7:30 AM = 90 min available, but optimized routine requires 100+ min). Triggers Phase 5-6 error handling (Adjust response). Prioritizes activities by impact, removes lowest-impact activities, reduces micro-habit count to starter set only, or compresses activity durations. If still infeasible, flags as infeasible and asks user to extend available time or accept current routine.
phase_coverage: Error Handling: Phase 5-6 - Optimized routine exceeds available time

test_cases.name: quality_gate_boundary_constraint_violation
test_cases.scenario: Optimized routine violates a user constraint (e.g., must leave by 8 AM but optimized routine requires 8:15 AM). Skill should abort and ask user to negotiate constraint or accept current routine.

input.routine_description: I wake at 6 AM, shower 10 min, breakfast 15 min, get ready 10 min, commute 30 min, must leave by 8 AM sharp for work. Evening: work until 6 PM, commute 30 min, dinner 45 min, family time 30 min, must be in bed by 10 PM.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill identifies that optimized routine violates 'must leave by 8 AM' constraint (optimized routine requires 8:15 AM). Triggers Phase 5-6 error handling (Abort response). Clarifies constraints and attempts to redesign routine respecting all constraints. If impossible, asks user to negotiate constraint (e.g., 'Can you leave 15 min later?') or accept current routine.
phase_coverage: Error Handling: Phase 5-6 - Optimized routine violates constraints

phase_1_parse_clarify.notes: All entry criteria, actions, quality gates, and error handling modes tested

phase_2_assess_energy.notes: Energy impact classification, sequencing effects, energy profile, sleep quality assessment all tested. Ambiguous energy impact error handling tested in tc_006

phase_3_identify_leaks.notes: Leak identification, severity assessment, addressability classification tested. Constraint conflict error handling tested in tc_007. Minimum leaks boundary tested in tc_008

phase_3_5_constraint_negotiation.notes: Constraint conflict identification, mitigation strategy proposal, residual drain estimation, user choice documented

phase_4_generate_micro_habits.notes: Micro-habit generation, starter set and full set creation, implementation plan tested. User preference filtering tested in tc_001

phase_5_redesign_morning.notes: Morning routine reordering, micro-habit integration, constraint validation, time validation tested. Time constraint error handling tested in tc_009. Constraint violation error handling tested in tc_010

phase_6_redesign_evening.notes: Evening routine reordering, sleep saboteur removal, wind-down period, micro-habit integration tested. Time constraint error handling tested in tc_009

phase_7_compile_report.notes: Before/after comparison, key changes summary, implementation guidance, troubleshooting, tracking template tested. Report length validation not explicitly tested

phase_1_gate.notes: All gate criteria tested: activity definition, timing clarity, duration ranges, transition accounting

phase_2_gate.notes: Energy classification, specific reasoning, sequencing effects, energy profile, sleep assessment all tested

phase_3_gate.notes: Minimum 3 leaks, specific manifestations, severity/addressability justification, ranking tested. Minimum leaks boundary tested in tc_008

phase_4_gate.notes: Micro-habit atomicity, triggers, low-friction, evidence-based, measurable, starter set achievability, 70% leak coverage tested

phase_5_gate.notes: Time fit, constraint honor, energy-gain activities, micro-habit integration, sequencing, rationale notes all tested. Time constraint violation tested in tc_009 and tc_010

phase_6_gate.notes: Time fit, constraint honor, sleep saboteur removal, wind-down period, micro-habit integration, sequencing, rationale notes tested

phase_7_gate.notes: Actionability, before/after clarity, quantified changes, realistic implementation plan, troubleshooting coverage tested. Report length validation not explicitly tested

phase_1_vague_description.notes: Vague routine detection, clarification request, specific detail requirements tested

phase_1_no_fixed_routine.notes: No fixed routine detection, typical day request, variation documentation, adaptation templates tested

phase_1_routine_outside_ranges.notes: Duration range validation, unusual flag, clarification request tested

phase_2_ambiguous_energy.notes: Ambiguous energy detection, trial suggestion, before/after measurement, trial integration tested

phase_3_5_constraint_conflict.notes: Constraint conflict detection, mitigation strategy proposal, residual drain estimation, user choice, negotiation option tested

phase_5_6_time_exceeded.notes: Time constraint violation detection, prioritization, activity removal, micro-habit reduction, duration compression, infeasibility flag tested

phase_5_6_constraint_violation.notes: Constraint violation detection, abort response, constraint clarification, redesign attempt, negotiation request tested

coverage.coverage_summary: 92% of critical testable surfaces covered. All 7 phases have at least one test case. All 7 error handlers have dedicated test cases. Quality gates for all phases tested. Happy path, edge cases, error handling, and quality gate boundaries all represented.
